work.name: Maxwell Institute, University of Edinburgh
work.summary: On the connection between sampling and optimization:Unbiased PDMC based methods.

volunteer.organization: SIAM Student Chapter, University of Edinburgh
volunteer.summary: Co-organize seminars, workshops, and social events for the applied mathematics community in Edinburgh, fostering exchange between postgraduate students and researchers across the Maxwell Institute and beyond.

volunteer.organization: SIAM Conference on Optimization, University of Edinburgh
volunteer.summary: Assist the organizers of the SIAM Conference on Optimization 2026, which was held in Edinburgh, UK, from June 1 to June 5, 2026. The conference bring together researchers and practitioners in the field of optimization to share their latest research and developments.

Plan and organize events and activities for the Mathematical Collaborative Forum, a non-profit organization that aims to promote mathematics and its applications in Africa. The forum provides a platform for students, researchers, and professionals to collaborate and share their knowledge and expertise in mathematics.

awards.title: Cameroon Presidential Grant
awards.summary: The grant was awarded to recognize outstanding academic excellence.

awards.title: Other Scholarships
awards.awarder: AIMS Cameroon (Cameroon, 2020-2021), FSMP (France, 2021-2022), EPSRC (UK, 2022-2026), ICTP (Italy, selected)
awards.summary: The different scholarships were awarded to support the pursuit of MSc and PhD degrees in applied mathematics.
